items.question: How long does a concrete sidewalk last?
items.answer: With proper installation, a Maxima Concrete sidewalk can last 30 years or more with minimal maintenance.

items.question: Are your walkways safe when wet?
items.answer: Yes. We apply broom and textured finishes that provide reliable traction in wet or icy conditions.

items.question: Can you match my existing driveway or patio finish?
items.answer: Yes. We can color- and texture-match new walkways to your existing surfaces for a seamless look.

items.question: Do you handle permits for sidewalk work?
items.answer: Yes. When a permit is required, we handle the paperwork and ensure the work meets local codes.
